confirmed_behavior.expected: Total should reflect the full cost of items in the cart. For a single line item with quantity 2 at $12.50 each, Total should be $25.00.
confirmed_behavior.observed: With quantity set to 2, the cart displays Unit $12.50 | Subtotal $25.00 but Total: $12.50.

reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Click 'Add to cart' on Blue Shockproof Phone Case.
Observe that Subtotal updates to $25.00 but Total remains $12.50.
title: Cart Total shows unit price instead of subtotal when quantity > 1
